reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the type of work Hovsep Pushman and Armen Chakmakian are each known for.
2. Return whose work is more likely to appear in an art gallery.
original_final_question: Whose works are more likely to be seen in an art gallery, Hovsep Pushman or Armen Chakmakian? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Hovsep Pushman is described as an artist associated with art galleries, while Armen Chakmakian is described as a musician and recording artist, so Hovsep Pushman is more likely to have works seen in an art gallery. -> Hovsep Pushman
